column2: - Additional Column "Previous Order" in sheets Orders and Detailed. The additional columns shows a free-text field, which can
be maintained with a previous order number, which was replaced.
new sheet "Comparison" (hidden, please unhide to test functionality)
The new sheet enables users to compare Order Report versions and to list all changes
- Actuals and predictions included in columns Jan - Dec (AU - BF) for services charged time & material, T&M. Please select
"ITS Request In." in column Item Category (L), sheet Detailed
- New color-coding for last actuals in columns Jan - Dec (AU - BF) for services charged consumption-based or time & material.
Last uploaded actuals are shown with background Green, Accent 3, 80% Lighter. The corresponding Quantity in column (AT)
of the last upload is also shown with background Green, Accent 3, 80% Lighter.
- New color-coding for predictions in columns Jan - Dec (AU - BF) for services charged consumption-based or time & material.
Predictions are shown with background Gold, Accent 6, 80% Lighter, while actuals remain with white background
- Statistical Items removed from sheet Detailed as not needed anymore after Salesforce introduction. (no effect on FTYP.
